title: Construction Analytics — Taison Group Ltd
description: Analyzed project construction data from 15+ active sites using SQL and Python, tracking budgets, timelines, and resource allocations. Automated Power BI dashboards for materials inventory, labor productivity, and equipment utilization. Monitored KPIs daily and delivered root cause analysis to prevent budget overruns.

title: AI Model Evaluation — Turing
description: Performed side-by-side evaluations on AI-generated outputs, assessing quality, accuracy, and relevance against established guidelines. Conducted fact-checking to identify inconsistencies and provided detailed, well-structured justifications to support evaluation decisions.

title: Global Labour Market Analytics Dashboard
description: Designed and published an end-to-end analytics pipeline using the ILO ILOEST dataset covering 200+ countries and 23 years of modelled labor market data. Built interactive Power BI dashboards for stakeholder-ready reporting on global workforce trends using DAX and M Language.
